de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionOperationContract

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessOperationContract, ExecutionOperationContract

    public interface IExecutionOperationContract
extends IExecutionNode<SourceElement>

    A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a use operation contract application.

    The default implementation is ExecutionOperationContract which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
    See Also:
    SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder, ExecutionOperationContract

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.IExecutionNode

        INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_END, INTERNAL_NODE_NAME_START

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Contract getContract()
      Returns the applied Contract.
      ImmutableList<Term> getContractParams()
      Returns the parameters of the called method for which a Contract is applied.
      IProgramMethod getContractProgramMethod()
      Returns the IProgramMethod of the applied Contract.
      Term getExceptionTerm()
      Returns the exception Term in which a by the Contract thrown Exception is stored.
      String getFormatedContractParams()
      Returns the human readable parameters of the called method for which a Contract is applied.
      String getFormatedExceptionTerm()
      Returns the human readable exception Term in which a by the Contract thrown Exception is stored.
      String getFormatedResultTerm()
      Returns the human readable result Term in which the result of the applied Contract is stored.
      String getFormatedSelfTerm()
      Returns the human readable self Term of the called method for which a Contract is applied.
      Term getResultTerm()
      Returns the result Term in which the result of the applied Contract is stored.
      Term getSelfTerm()
      Returns the self Term of the called method for which a Contract is applied.
      boolean hasNotNullCheck()
      Checks if a not null check is available (instance method) or not (static method or constructor).
      boolean isNotNullCheckComplied()
      Checks if the not null check is complied.
      boolean isPreconditionComplied()
      Checks if the precondition is complied.

    • Method Detail

      • getContract

        Contract getContract()
        Returns the applied Contract.
        Returns:
        The applied Contract.

      • getContractProgramMethod

        IProgramMethod getContractProgramMethod()
        Returns the IProgramMethod of the applied Contract.
        Returns:
        The IProgramMethod of the applied Contract.

      • isPreconditionComplied

        boolean isPreconditionComplied()
        Checks if the precondition is complied.
        Returns:
        true precondition complied, false precondition not complied.

      • hasNotNullCheck

        boolean hasNotNullCheck()
        Checks if a not null check is available (instance method) or not (static method or constructor).
        Returns:
        true not null check available, false not null check is not available.

      • isNotNullCheckComplied

        boolean isNotNullCheckComplied()
        Checks if the not null check is complied.
        Returns:
        true not null check complied, false not null check not complied.

                   throws ProofInputException
        Returns the result Term in which the result of the applied Contract is stored.

      • getSelfTerm

        Term getSelfTerm()
                 throws ProofInputException
        Returns the self Term of the called method for which a Contract is applied.
        Returns:

        Throws:
        ProofInputException - Occurred Exception.
